basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nio.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR NIO Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR NIO is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc degree in Marine Biology, Marine Science, Oceanography, or Zoology to be eligible for the Project Associate - I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate - I position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CSIR NIO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate - I position announced by CSIR-National Institute of Oceanography.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the CSIR NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Goa.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at CSIR-National Institute of Oceanography.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Goa apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies applications are invited from eligible candidates in Goa. It's advisable to check the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
